case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA COMPANY VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,680.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY FILING FEES PD BY THE STATE OF CA
